title: Guard And Strike Builder
description: A mixed fundamentals workout combining punches, kicks and basic defensive reactions.

exercises.title: High Guard → Jab
exercises.description: Set a tight high guard, then fire a jab.
exercises.help: Return the lead hand to your guard after every jab.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Throw a basic one-two punch combination.
exercises.help: Keep your chin tucked and rotate on the cross.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Cross
exercises.description: Check an imagined low kick, then answer with a cross.
exercises.help: Land balanced before throwing the punch.

exercises.title: Lead Teep
exercises.description: Use the lead leg to push forward.
exercises.help: Drive through the ball of the foot.

exercises.title: Step Back → Jab
exercises.description: Step out of range and return with a jab.
exercises.help: Do not cross your feet while retreating.

exercises.title: Cross → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Throw a rear straight followed by a lead hook.
exercises.help: Shift weight smoothly into the hook.

exercises.title: Low Kick
exercises.description: Throw controlled low kicks to the thigh line.
exercises.help: Strike with the shin and return to stance.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Frame with the lead arm, then push with the rear teep.
exercises.help: Keep the frame active before kicking.

exercises.title: Slip Outside → Cross
exercises.description: Move your head outside the center line and counter with a cross.
exercises.help: Bend slightly through the knees, not the waist.

exercises.title: Body Kick
exercises.description: Throw round kicks to the body.
exercises.help: Turn your hip over and keep your opposite hand high.

title: Kick Punch Defense Circuit
description: A beginner striking circuit that alternates simple attacks with defensive movement.

exercises.title: Jab → Lead Teep
exercises.description: Use the jab to set up a lead push kick.
exercises.help: Keep the jab sharp and the teep straight.

exercises.title: High Guard → Cross
exercises.description: Cover high, then fire a rear straight punch.
exercises.help: Do not drop the lead hand during the cross.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Low Kick
exercises.description: Check a kick and immediately return a low kick.
exercises.help: Return the kick without overstepping.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → Body Kick
exercises.description: Punch into a body kick finish.
exercises.help: Let the cross rotation load the kick.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Jab
exercises.description: Parry an incoming teep and answer with a jab.
exercises.help: Redirect lightly instead of swatting hard.

exercises.title: Lead Hook → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Throw a lead hook followed by a rear push kick.
exercises.help: Reset your stance before the teep.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Cross
exercises.description: Angle away and counter with a cross.
exercises.help: Move your lead foot first when stepping off-line.

exercises.title: Rear Hook → Low Kick
exercises.description: Throw a rear hook and finish with a low kick.
exercises.help: Keep your weight under control after the hook.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Body Kick
exercises.description: Use long guard to measure range, then kick the body.
exercises.help: Retract the guard as the kick turns over.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Lean out of range and return with a one-two.
exercises.help: Keep the pull short so you can counter quickly.

title: Balanced Eight Limbs Starter
description: A fundamentals workout blending punches, kicks, knees, elbows and defenses.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Practice the basic straight punch combination.
exercises.help: Keep both punches direct and clean.

exercises.title: High Guard → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Cover, then throw a lead hook.
exercises.help: Rotate your lead foot as the hook lands.

exercises.title: Lead Teep
exercises.description: Push forward with the lead leg.
exercises.help: Bring the knee up before extending the kick.

exercises.title: Shin Check
exercises.description: Lift the leg to block low kicks.
exercises.help: Point your knee slightly outward.

exercises.title: Cross → Body Kick
exercises.description: Use the cross to set up a body kick.
exercises.help: Let the hip rotation flow into the kick.

exercises.title: Straight Knee
exercises.description: Drive the knee forward from stance.
exercises.help: Extend your hips through the target.

exercises.title: Long Guard
exercises.description: Use the lead arm to manage distance.
exercises.help: Keep your rear hand close to your cheek.

exercises.title: Horizontal Elbow
exercises.description: Throw compact horizontal elbows.
exercises.help: Step in before rotating the elbow.

exercises.title: Step Back → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Create distance, then push back with the rear teep.
exercises.help: Stay tall as the teep extends.

exercises.title: Jab → Lead Hook → Low Kick
exercises.description: Mix hand strikes with a low kick finish.
exercises.help: Keep the combination smooth, not rushed.

title: Defensive Striker Mix
description: An intermediate workout built around defensive reactions followed by mixed attacks.

exercises.title: Slip Inside → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Slip inside a straight punch and counter with a hook.
exercises.help: Keep your eyes forward during the slip.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Cross → Low Kick
exercises.description: Block a kick, punch, then return a low kick.
exercises.help: Land the checking leg before countering.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Body Kick
exercises.description: Redirect a teep and answer with a body kick.
exercises.help: Step outside after the parry.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Control range, then enter with straight punches.
exercises.help: Do not collapse your long guard.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Pull away from an attack and push back with the rear leg.
exercises.help: Keep your shoulders over your hips.

exercises.title: High Guard → Lead Hook → Cross
exercises.description: Shell up, then return with hook-cross.
exercises.help: Open your guard only when you strike.

exercises.title: Kick Catch → Straight Knee
exercises.description: Catch an imagined body kick and counter with a knee.
exercises.help: Keep posture strong while controlling the leg.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Body Kick
exercises.description: Move to an angle and kick the body.
exercises.help: Turn your hips fully after stepping.

exercises.title: Forearm Frame → Horizontal Elbow
exercises.description: Frame to create space, then throw an elbow.
exercises.help: Keep the elbow short and sharp.

exercises.title: Angle Step → Jab → Low Kick
exercises.description: Step to an angle, jab and finish with a low kick.
exercises.help: Keep the kick balanced after the angle step.

exercises.title: Cross Parry → Cross
exercises.description: Parry a rear straight and answer with your own cross.
exercises.help: Use a small parry and fire straight back.

exercises.title: Lean Back vs Kick → High Kick
exercises.description: Lean away from a kick and return high.
exercises.help: Reset your base before kicking.

title: Pressure Punch Kick Defense
description: A striking workout that builds pressure combinations while reinforcing defensive habits.

exercises.title: Jab → Jab → Low Kick
exercises.description: Double jab to enter and finish with a low kick.
exercises.help: Use the second jab to cover distance.

exercises.title: High Guard → Cross → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Cover first, then throw a two-punch counter.
exercises.help: Stay tight before opening to punch.

exercises.title: Lead Teep → Cross
exercises.description: Push the opponent back and follow with a cross.
exercises.help: Place the kicking foot down in stance before punching.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Jab → Body Kick
exercises.description: Defend a low kick, jab and kick the body.
exercises.help: Use the jab to hide the body kick.

exercises.title: Rear Hook → Lead Teep
exercises.description: Throw a rear hook and push away with the lead teep.
exercises.help: Do not over-rotate the hook.

exercises.title: Slip Outside → Cross → Low Kick
exercises.description: Slip, counter straight and kick low.
exercises.help: The cross should load the low kick.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Use long guard to hold range, then rear teep.
exercises.help: Keep the rear hand ready to defend.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → High Kick
exercises.description: Use straight punches to set up the high kick.
exercises.help: Keep your guard high as the kick rises.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Parry a push kick and answer with a one-two.
exercises.help: Step forward immediately after the parry.

exercises.title: Body Kick → High Guard
exercises.description: Kick the body and recover into high guard.
exercises.help: Return to stance before covering.

exercises.title: Lead Hook → Rear Hook → Shin Check
exercises.description: Throw hooks and finish by checking a kick.
exercises.help: Stay balanced enough to lift the checking leg.

exercises.title: Step Back → Jab → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Retreat, jab and push with the rear leg.
exercises.help: Use the jab to interrupt forward pressure.

title: Footwork Counter Flow
description: A movement-focused workout combining footwork, counters, kicks and punches.

exercises.title: Step Back → Jab
exercises.description: Retreat just out of range and fire a jab.
exercises.help: Keep the step short and balanced.

exercises.title: Angle Step → Cross
exercises.description: Create an angle and throw the rear straight.
exercises.help: Point your lead foot toward the target.

exercises.title: Circle Out → Lead Teep
exercises.description: Circle away and push with the lead teep.
exercises.help: Do not let your stance square up.

exercises.title: V-Step → Low Kick
exercises.description: Step diagonally back and return a low kick.
exercises.help: Kick after your base is stable.

exercises.title: L-Step → Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Use an L-step to exit and answer with straight punches.
exercises.help: Keep your eyes forward through the movement.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Body Kick
exercises.description: Step outside the center line and kick the body.
exercises.help: Let the step set the angle for the kick.

exercises.title: Pivot Escape → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Pivot away and return with a lead hook.
exercises.help: Keep the hook tight after the pivot.

exercises.title: Lateral Movement → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Move sideways and push with the rear teep.
exercises.help: Reset your stance before extending the teep.

exercises.title: Angle Step → Shin Check
exercises.description: Angle out and check an incoming kick.
exercises.help: Lift the check from a strong base.

exercises.title: Retreat And Reset → Jab → Low Kick
exercises.description: Reset your stance, jab and kick low.
exercises.help: Do not rush after the retreat.

title: Advanced Defensive Chains
description: An advanced defense workout that links evasions, blocks and mixed counters.

exercises.title: Slip Outside → Cross → Body Kick
exercises.description: Slip a straight punch, counter with a cross and finish with a kick.
exercises.help: Keep the counter compact so the kick follows smoothly.

exercises.title: High Guard → Lead Hook → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Absorb pressure, hook and push away.
exercises.help: Do not stay shelled after defending.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Cross → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Check a kick and return with two punches.
exercises.help: Place the checking foot down before punching.

exercises.title: Kick Catch → Dump
exercises.description: Catch an imagined kick and complete a dump motion.
exercises.help: Turn the opponent's balance line as you dump.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Low Kick → Cross
exercises.description: Parry the teep, kick low and punch straight.
exercises.help: Step outside before kicking.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Diagonal Knee
exercises.description: Frame at range and enter with a diagonal knee.
exercises.help: Pull slightly with the frame as the knee rises.

exercises.title: Forearm Frame → Diagonal Down Elbow
exercises.description: Frame to create space and cut down with the elbow.
exercises.help: Keep the elbow strike short and balanced.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Cross → High Kick
exercises.description: Pull away from a punch, cross and kick high.
exercises.help: Reset the stance before the high kick.

exercises.title: Cross Parry → Cross → Low Kick
exercises.description: Parry, counter straight and chop the leg.
exercises.help: Use a small parry to keep the counter fast.

exercises.title: Lean Away vs Knee → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Move the hips away from a knee and counter with a hook.
exercises.help: Do not lean so far that you lose balance.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Horizontal Elbow
exercises.description: Angle outside and enter with a horizontal elbow.
exercises.help: Step close enough before rotating.

exercises.title: Kick Catch → Knee → Cross
exercises.description: Catch a kick, knee and finish with a cross.
exercises.help: Keep posture tall during the knee.

title: Conditioned Counter Rounds
description: A high-volume conditioning workout using mixed Muay Thai counters.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → Low Kick
exercises.description: High-repetition punch-to-kick combination.
exercises.help: Keep every rep sharp, not sloppy.

exercises.title: High Guard → Cross
exercises.description: Cover and counter with the rear hand.
exercises.help: Recover guard immediately after the cross.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Body Kick
exercises.description: Check and return a body kick.
exercises.help: Kick back as soon as your foot lands.

exercises.title: Lead Teep → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Alternate lead and rear push kicks.
exercises.help: Stay tall and balanced.

exercises.title: Slip Outside → Cross
exercises.description: Slip and fire the rear straight.
exercises.help: Use the legs to move your head.

exercises.title: Lead Hook → Body Kick
exercises.description: Hook into a body kick.
exercises.help: Let the hook rotation load your kick.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Straight Knee
exercises.description: Frame and drive a straight knee.
exercises.help: Push the hips through the target.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Jab
exercises.description: Parry a teep and answer with a jab.
exercises.help: Keep the parry small and efficient.

exercises.title: Low Kick → High Guard
exercises.description: Kick low and recover into high guard.
exercises.help: Protect your head on the exit.

exercises.title: Cross → Lead Hook → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Punch twice and push away.
exercises.help: Reset before launching the teep.

exercises.title: Step Back → Jab → Cross
exercises.description: Retreat and counter with straight punches.
exercises.help: Keep pressure without rushing forward.

exercises.title: Horizontal Elbow → Shin Check
exercises.description: Throw an elbow and finish with a defensive check.
exercises.help: Stay compact after the elbow.

title: Intermediate Range Control
description: A range-control workout using teeps, long guard, straight punches and defensive checks.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Jab
exercises.description: Use the long guard to measure before jabbing.
exercises.help: Keep your rear hand ready to defend.

exercises.title: Lead Teep → Jab
exercises.description: Push with the lead leg and follow with a jab.
exercises.help: Set the kicking foot down under control.

exercises.title: Rear Teep → Cross
exercises.description: Push with the rear leg and punch straight.
exercises.help: Do not fall forward after the teep.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Lead Teep
exercises.description: Redirect a teep and return your own lead teep.
exercises.help: Counter before the opponent resets.

exercises.title: Step Back → Body Kick
exercises.description: Step away and kick the body as the opponent advances.
exercises.help: Keep the kick long and balanced.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Jab
exercises.description: Check the kick and answer with a jab.
exercises.help: Return to stance before punching.

exercises.title: Cross → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Throw a cross and push away with the rear teep.
exercises.help: Use the teep to regain range.

exercises.title: Lead Hook → Low Kick
exercises.description: Hook upstairs and finish low.
exercises.help: Keep your hook tight and your kick committed.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Lead Teep
exercises.description: Pull out of range and push the opponent back.
exercises.help: Do not lean too far over your rear leg.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → Long Guard
exercises.description: Punch in, then recover to long guard.
exercises.help: Finish with structure, not loose hands.

exercises.title: Angle Step → Low Kick
exercises.description: Create an angle and kick the lead leg.
exercises.help: Kick from outside the center line.

title: Close Range Striker Defense
description: An intermediate workout blending punches, elbows, knees, kicks and defensive framing.

exercises.title: High Guard → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Cover tight and counter with a lead hook.
exercises.help: Keep the hook compact in close range.

exercises.title: Forearm Frame → Straight Knee
exercises.description: Frame to make space and drive a knee forward.
exercises.help: Keep your posture tall.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → Horizontal Elbow
exercises.description: Enter with straight punches and finish with an elbow.
exercises.help: Step in before throwing the elbow.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Diagonal Knee
exercises.description: Control range and attack with a diagonal knee.
exercises.help: Turn your hip slightly into the knee.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Rear Hook
exercises.description: Check the kick and return with a rear hook.
exercises.help: Do not swing wide after the check.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Upward Elbow
exercises.description: Angle off and drive the elbow upward.
exercises.help: Keep your opposite hand high.

exercises.title: Lead Teep → Cross
exercises.description: Push to manage range, then throw a cross.
exercises.help: Keep the teep straight and controlled.

exercises.title: Kick Catch → Curved Knee
exercises.description: Catch a body kick and answer with a curved knee.
exercises.help: Pull the target slightly into the knee line.

exercises.title: Rear Uppercut → Lead Hook → Low Kick
exercises.description: Punch in close and exit with a low kick.
exercises.help: Keep your head protected between punches.

exercises.title: Frame Escape → Body Kick
exercises.description: Create space with a frame and kick the body.
exercises.help: Separate before turning the kick over.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Cross → Straight Knee
exercises.description: Pull away, punch back and step into a knee.
exercises.help: Use the cross to close distance again.

exercises.title: High Guard → Downward Elbow
exercises.description: Cover and chop downward with the elbow.
exercises.help: Keep the motion controlled and compact.

title: Advanced Full Arsenal Flow
description: A complete advanced Muay Thai workout mixing punches, kicks, elbows, knees and defense.

exercises.title: Jab → Cross → Body Kick
exercises.description: Use straight punches to set up a powerful body kick.
exercises.help: Turn the kick over immediately after the cross.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Cross → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Check a kick and counter with a two-punch combination.
exercises.help: Keep your balance after the check.

exercises.title: Lead Teep → Rear Hook → Low Kick
exercises.description: Push, punch and finish low.
exercises.help: Do not let the hook pull you off balance.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Straight Knee → Horizontal Elbow
exercises.description: Frame into a knee and finish with an elbow.
exercises.help: Step in tightly before the elbow.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Cross → High Kick
exercises.description: Parry a teep, punch and kick high.
exercises.help: Use the cross to hide the high kick.

exercises.title: Slip Outside → Rear Uppercut → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Slip and counter with an uppercut-hook combination.
exercises.help: Keep your knees bent through the slip.

exercises.title: Kick Catch → Dump → Jab
exercises.description: Catch, dump and reset with a jab.
exercises.help: Complete the dump before striking again.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Diagonal Down Elbow
exercises.description: Angle away and cut down with the elbow.
exercises.help: Enter close enough before striking.

exercises.title: Pull Back → Cross → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Evade, punch and push the opponent back.
exercises.help: Keep the pull short and controlled.

exercises.title: Body Kick → High Guard → Cross
exercises.description: Kick, recover defensively and counter straight.
exercises.help: Return to guard before punching.

exercises.title: Angle Step → Jab → Low Kick
exercises.description: Step to an angle, jab and chop the leg.
exercises.help: Use the angle to make the low kick safer.

exercises.title: Frame Escape → Curved Knee → Lead Hook
exercises.description: Frame out, knee and finish with a hook.
exercises.help: Stay upright during the knee.

exercises.title: Cross Parry → Cross → Body Kick
exercises.description: Parry, counter straight and kick the body.
exercises.help: Keep the counter immediate.

exercises.title: High Guard → Spinning Elbow
exercises.description: Cover first, then rotate into a spinning elbow.
exercises.help: Spot the target before releasing the elbow.

exercises.title: Jab → Rear Uppercut → High Kick
exercises.description: Punch up the middle and finish high.
exercises.help: Keep the uppercut tight to avoid overexposure.

title: Beginner Defensive Movement Mix
description: A beginner-friendly workout that teaches movement, basic defense and simple counters.

exercises.title: High Guard
exercises.description: Practice setting a tight high guard.
exercises.help: Keep your elbows close and chin tucked.

exercises.title: High Guard → Jab
exercises.description: Cover, then fire a lead-hand straight punch.
exercises.help: Return quickly to guard.

exercises.title: Step Back → Cross
exercises.description: Move backward and counter with a cross.
exercises.help: Do not lean backward as you punch.

exercises.title: Shin Check
exercises.description: Practice checking low kicks.
exercises.help: Keep your standing leg strong.

exercises.title: Shin Check → Low Kick
exercises.description: Block and return a low kick.
exercises.help: Land and kick back with control.

exercises.title: Lead Teep
exercises.description: Use the lead teep to manage distance.
exercises.help: Bring the foot back to stance.

exercises.title: Teep Parry
exercises.description: Redirect an incoming push kick.
exercises.help: Parry across the center line with a small motion.

exercises.title: Teep Parry → Jab
exercises.description: Parry and immediately return a jab.
exercises.help: Keep the counter straight and fast.

exercises.title: Long Guard → Rear Teep
exercises.description: Frame for range, then push with the rear leg.
exercises.help: Stay tall and balanced.

exercises.title: Step Off-Line → Body Kick
exercises.description: Move off the center line and kick the body.
exercises.help: Step first, then rotate the kick.
